function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Requested design-partner invoice bundle
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
related_projects:
  - northstar_ledger
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the two oldest invoices linked to your design partner, attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft created successfully; verification checks pass (attachments are read paths, newest-first among selected oldest-two set, recipient canonical). Next finalize workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft, deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing request.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a reply draft with the requested invoice bundle and then clearing the inbox item. Created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md` addressed to `miles@novak.example` with the two oldest design-partner-linked invoices attached (ordered newest-first as required): `2025_12_01__...inv_0002...` and `2025_11_03__...inv_0001...`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, treated inbox header as canonical sender metadata, resolved recipient via canonical primary_contact_email, used durable outbox record format, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request came from `miles@novak.example`, matching the canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/miles.md`. 'Design partner' resolves canonically to Nina (`relationship: startup_partner`) in `10_entities/cast/nina.md`. The Northstar invoices linked to Nina were verified from canonical invoice records; the two oldest by issue date are 2025-11-03 (INV-0001) and 2025-12-01 (INV-0002). Outbound draft was created with those attachments in mandatory newest-first attachment order among selected files, then processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
